isPhoneNumber: {property} must be a valid phone number
minLength: {property} must be longer than or equal to {constraints.0} characters
maxLength: {property} must be shorter than or equal to {constraints.0} characters
isIn: {property} must be one of the following values: {value}
isEnum: {property} must be one of the following values: {enum}
isNumber: {property} must be a number conforming to the specified constraints
lengthBetween: {property} must be between {constraints.0} and {constraints.1} characters long
eachStringInArray: {property} must be an array and each element must be string
eachEnumInArray: {property} must be an array and each element must be one of the following values: {enum}
countryCodeRequiredWhenPhoneProvided: Country code is required when phone is provided
isoCodeRequiredWhenPhoneProvided: ISO code is required when phone is provided
phoneNumberMustContainOnlyDigits: Phone number must contain only digits
phoneNumberLength: Phone number must be 6 to 15 digits long
dateMatches: Date must be a valid date in the format YYYY-MM-DD
isValidTime: {property} must be a valid time in the format HH:mm:ss
